ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spi_flash_pins" (
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin */,
  "spi_flash_pin" TEXT /* Name of the SPI Flash pin */,
  "fpga_connection" TEXT /* Corresponding FPGA connection */,
  "st_micro_pin" TEXT /* Pin name for STMicro devices */,
  "nex_flash_pin" TEXT /* Pin name for NexFlash devices */,
  "silicon_storage_pin" TEXT /* Pin name for Silicon Storage Technology devices */,
  "atmel_pin" TEXT /* Pin name for Atmel devices */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pin */,
  "voltage_level" TEXT /* Voltage level of the pin */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of signal (input, output, bi-directional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spi_flash_pins_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the manufacturer's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team managing the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the configuration belongs to */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer the configuration is for */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, under review, archived) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team managing the configuration */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES configuration_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_updated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_configurations" (
  "config_pin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pin configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the pin belongs to */,
  "pin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pin being configured */,
  "fpga_pin" TEXT /* FPGA pin name */,
  "spi_flash_pin" TEXT /* SPI Flash pin name */,
  "manufacturer_pin" TEXT /* Manufacturer-specific pin name */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pin configuration (e.g., active, under review, archived) */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the pin configuration */,
  "updated_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the pin configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the pin configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_pin_id FOREIGN KEY ("pin_id") REFERENCES spi_flash_pins ("pin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_updated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES pin_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pin_configurations_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this status is the default status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pin_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if this status is the default status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
